sections_cited: Section 14 of Sindh Building Control Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4047 of 2025 Ajaz Ahmed Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 16562/25 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 29.08.2025 Mr. Muddasir Iqbal, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, AAG along with Mr. Mushtaque Ahmed Field Officer, Heritage and Muhammad Iqbal, Assistant, DC South Office Karachi. Mr. Khursheed Javed, advocate for SBCA along with Mr. Lal Khan Magsi, Deputy Director SBCA. -.-.- Mr. Khursheed Javed Advocate files his memo of appearance along with comments on behalf of Sindh Building Control Authority whereas comments have also been filed on behalf of Culture, Tourism, Antiquities & Archives Department respondent No.4, which are taken on record, showing that the subject shop was sealed after being declared as dangerous in terms of Section 14 of Sindh Building Control Ordinance, 1979. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that his printing machines and certain articles are available in the shop and the petitioner may be permitted to take out the same. Learned counsel for the Sindh Building Control Authority submits that tomorrow they will de-seal the subject shop and will seal the same on Tuesday 02.09.2025 in the evening enabling the petitioner to remove the printing machines and other articles lying in the shop in question meanwhile. Order accordingly. The petition is accordingly disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. Compliance report however shall be submitted to MIT-II of this Court after the needful is done. Judge Judge
